description: codex exec -m gpt-5.5 makes external network call to OpenAI API. Expected workflow behavior for a Codex-based audit harness; input paths are validated via _validate_repo_relative() (no leading /, no .., no whitespace).
suggested_fix: No fix required. Document the OpenAI API dependency in README and consider noting required OPENAI_API_KEY in plugin.json.

description: requests.get to api.crossref.org for DOI resolution. Gracefully degrades when requests is absent; no credential handling; timeout=10 set.
suggested_fix: No fix required. Expected behavior for Crossref DOI resolution. Consider adding requests to optional dependencies list.

description: SessionStart hook executes announce-ars-loaded.sh on every session start. Script is stdout-only with no write side-effects and no network calls.
suggested_fix: No fix required. Script is well-scoped and read-only. Low-risk shell execution surface.

description: Frontmatter description says '13-agent pipeline' but deep-research/agents/ contains 14 files. timeline_extraction_agent was added in v3.9.4 but count was not updated.
suggested_fix: Change '13-agent' to '14-agent' in frontmatter description field.

description: Body heading 'Agent Team (13 Agents)' should read '(14 Agents)'. timeline_extraction_agent row is missing from the Agent Team table.
suggested_fix: Update heading to '## Agent Team (14 Agents)' and add timeline_extraction_agent row to the table.

description: Compact/resume branch hardcodes 'ARS v3.7.0' but plugin.json declares 3.9.4.2. Four version cycles of features (v3.7.3 three-layer citation, v3.8 claim-faithfulness gate, v3.9.x phase-boundary fencing) not reflected.
suggested_fix: Replace 'ARS v3.7.0' with '3.9.4.2' or read dynamically: jq -r .version .claude-plugin/plugin.json

description: No guidance for invocation without arguments. If user invokes /ars-full with no text, nothing prompts for paper topic.
suggested_fix: Append: 'If no paper topic or context is provided, ask the user what they want to research or write.'
Append: 'If no paper topic or context is provided, ask the user what they want to plan.'
Append: 'If no draft or revision comments are provided, ask the user to share the paper and reviewer feedback.'
Append: 'If no reviewer comments are provided, ask the user to paste the review feedback.'
Append: 'If no paper is provided, ask the user to share the manuscript or key points for the abstract.'
Append: 'If no research topic is provided, ask the user what area to review.'
Append: 'If no file or target format is specified, ask the user for the source and target format.'
Append: 'If no bibliography is provided, ask the user to share the references to check.'
Append: 'If no venue or AI tools are specified, ask the user for the target journal and the AI tools used in the work.'
Append: 'If no paper topic or context is provided, ask the user what they want to outline.'

description: Description reads 'papers field' and 'teams identities' — missing possessive apostrophes in two places.
suggested_fix: Change 'papers field' → 'paper\'s field' and 'teams identities' → 'team\'s identities'.

description: Description reads 'devils advocate' — missing possessive apostrophe.
suggested_fix: Change 'devils advocate' → 'devil\'s advocate'.

description: Description reads 'papers core argument' — missing possessive apostrophe.
suggested_fix: Change 'papers core argument' → 'paper\'s core argument'.

description: Contains 10+ vague quantifiers throughout Adaptive Checkpoint System and routing logic sections: 'appropriate mode', 'relevant agents', 'sufficient context', 'reasonable approach', 'suitable method'. Hits -20 vague-quantifier cap.
suggested_fix: Replace vague terms with specific observable criteria: 'appropriate mode' → 'the mode matching the user\'s stage_hint field per MODE_REGISTRY.md'; 'sufficient context' → 'at least one of: RQ Brief, Annotated Bibliography, or existing draft section provided'.
